case_title: BRIAN MORRAN VS. E BAY INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2014 - CONTINUED TO OCT-09-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEFANIE TAMURA--PARALEGAL. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRAN, BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT E BAY INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
